member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.Pio
member.summary: Entry point to the RP2040/RP2350 PIO blocks. Use to obtain a , load an assembled , and claim a state machine.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.Pio.Get(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the PIO block at (0 or 1; 2 is RP2350-only).

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssemblerOptions
member.summary: Construction-time options for .

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssemblerOptions.Version
member.summary: Target PIO version. RP2350 unlocks v1-only instructions.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssemblerOptions.SideSetCount
member.summary: Side-set value-bit count (0..5). Reduces the per-instruction delay range.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssemblerOptions.SideSetOpt
member.summary: When true, side-set is optional and an enable bit is reserved.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssemblerOptions.SideSetPinDirs
member.summary: When true, side-set drives PINDIRS instead of PINS.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler
member.summary: Builds a from fluent instruction calls. Modeled on System.Reflection.Emit.ILGenerator: then , with forward references resolved in .

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an assembler with default options (no side-set, RP2040).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.#ctor(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssemblerOptions)
member.summary: Creates an assembler with the given options.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.MaxDelay
member.summary: Maximum delay encodable per instruction given the side-set configuration.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Count
member.summary: Number of instructions emitted so far (the current program offset).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.DefineLabel
member.summary: Allocates an unbound label. Place it later with .

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.MarkLabel(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioLabel)
member.summary: Binds a label to the current program offset.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.WrapTarget
member.summary: Marks the wrap-target (PC wraps back here). Defaults to offset 0.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Wrap
member.summary: Marks the wrap point (the last instruction that wraps). Defaults to the final instruction.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.SetOrigin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Pins the program to a fixed load offset 0..31 (default: relocatable, -1).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.OutShift(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioShiftDir,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Default OUT/pull shift behavior (equivalent to pioasm .out).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.InShift(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioShiftDir,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Default IN/push shift behavior (equivalent to pioasm .in).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Jmp(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioLabel)
member.summary: JMP <label> (unconditional).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Jmp(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioLabel)
member.summary: JMP <cond> <label>.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Jmp(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition,System.Int32)
member.summary: JMP to an absolute program offset.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Wait(System.Boolean,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioWaitSource,System.Int32)
member.summary: WAIT <polarity> <source> <index>.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.WaitGpio(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: WAIT for an absolute GPIO to reach .

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.WaitPin(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: WAIT for an IN-base-relative pin to reach .

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.WaitIrq(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: WAIT for IRQ flag (0..7) to reach .

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.In(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc,System.Int32)
member.summary: IN <source>, <bitCount> (1..32).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Out(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest,System.Int32)
member.summary: OUT <dest>, <bitCount> (1..32).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Push(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: PUSH [iffull] [block].

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Pull(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: PULL [ifempty] [block].

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Mov(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc)
member.summary: MOV <dest>, <src>.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Mov(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovOp,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc)
member.summary: MOV <dest>, <op> <src>.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.MovToRxFifo(System.Int32)
member.summary: (RP2350/PIO v1) MOV RXFIFO[index], ISR — write ISR to RX FIFO slot 0..3.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.MovToRxFifoIndexedY
member.summary: (RP2350/PIO v1) MOV RXFIFO[Y], ISR — write ISR to the slot selected by Y.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.MovFromRxFifo(System.Int32)
member.summary: (RP2350/PIO v1) MOV OSR, RXFIFO[index] — read RX FIFO slot 0..3 into OSR.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.MovFromRxFifoIndexedY
member.summary: (RP2350/PIO v1) MOV OSR, RXFIFO[Y] — read the slot selected by Y into OSR.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Irq(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: IRQ <index> [clear] [wait].

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Set(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest,System.Int32)
member.summary: SET <dest>, <value> (0..31).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Nop
member.summary: NOP (alias of MOV Y, Y).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioAssembler.Build
member.summary: Resolves labels, packs delay/side-set, validates ranges, and returns the finished . Throws with a clear message on any out-of-range delay/side value, unbound label, or oversized program.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioInterruptEventHandler
member.summary: Handles a PIO interrupt raised on a block. is the bit mask of state-machine IRQ flags (0..3) that fired (bit n set means SM-relative irq n).

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock
member.summary: A single PIO block (instruction memory shared by four state machines). Wraps the native hardware_pio instance program-load and state-machine claiming.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.Index
member.summary: Block index (0..2).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.AddProgram(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram)
member.summary: Loads an assembled program into this block's instruction memory and returns the load offset (maps to pio_add_program). Throws if there is no room.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.RemoveProgram(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Removes a previously added program (maps to pio_remove_program).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.ClaimStateMachine
member.summary: Claims a free state machine on this block (maps to pio_claim_unused_sm).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.StateMachine(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a specific state machine (0..3) on this block. Unlike this does not mark the SM as claimed, so the caller is responsible for avoiding collisions; prefer unless a fixed SM index is required.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.InitGpio(System.Int32)
member.summary: Routes a GPIO to this PIO block so a state machine can drive/read it (maps to pio_gpio_init: sets the pad's function select to PIO0/PIO1). Required before a pin mapped via OUT/SET/side-set/IN actually reaches the physical pad.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.InitGpioRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Routes consecutive GPIOs from to this block.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.ForceIrq(System.Int32)
member.summary: Raises PIO IRQ flag (0..7) from the CPU side (maps to IRQ_FORCE).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.ClearIrq(System.Int32)
member.summary: Clears PIO IRQ flag (0..7), e.g. one raised by a state machine's irq.

member.name: E:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioBlock.Interrupt
member.summary: Raised when a state machine on this block asserts a PIO IRQ flag (0..3), or one is forced from the CPU with . The handler runs on the event thread with no CPU polling. Subscribing arms the interrupt; the last unsubscription disarms it. The flag is cleared natively before the event is delivered.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder
member.summary: Stateless helpers that build the 16-bit PIO opcodes. The base-opcode methods emit the instruction without the shared delay/side-set field, which is layered on afterwards by once the program's side-set configuration is known.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Jmp(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition,System.Int32)
member.summary: JMP <cond> <addr>. Address is an absolute program offset 0..31.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Wait(System.Boolean,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioWaitSource,System.Int32)
member.summary: WAIT <polarity> <source> <index>.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.In(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc,System.Int32)
member.summary: IN <source>, <bitCount> (1..32; 32 encodes as 0).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Out(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest,System.Int32)
member.summary: OUT <dest>, <bitCount> (1..32; 32 encodes as 0).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Push(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: PUSH [iffull] [block].

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Pull(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: PULL [ifempty] [block].

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Mov(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovOp,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc)
member.summary: MOV <dest>, [op] <src>.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.MovToRxFifo(System.Int32)
member.summary: (v1) MOV RXFIFO[index], ISR — write ISR to RX FIFO slot 0..3.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.MovToRxFifoIndexedY
member.summary: (v1) MOV RXFIFO[Y], ISR — write ISR to the RX FIFO slot selected by Y.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.MovFromRxFifo(System.Int32)
member.summary: (v1) MOV OSR, RXFIFO[index] — read RX FIFO slot 0..3 into OSR.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.MovFromRxFifoIndexedY
member.summary: (v1) MOV OSR, RXFIFO[Y] — read the RX FIFO slot selected by Y into OSR.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Irq(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: IRQ [clear] [wait] <index>.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Set(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest,System.Int32)
member.summary: SET <dest>, <value> (0..31).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.Nop
member.summary: NOP is an alias for MOV Y, Y.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.DelayBits(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Number of delay bits available given the side-set configuration. The 5-bit [12:8] field is split: side-set value bits (plus one enable bit when optional) take the top, the remaining low bits are delay.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioEncoder.PackDelaySideSet(System.UInt16,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Layers the delay and optional side-set value onto a base opcode. Mirrors pico-sdk pio_encode_delay / pio_encode_sideset[_opt].
member.param: Opcode from one of the encode methods (no delay/side field).
Whether this instruction asserts a side-set value.
Side-set value-bit count (excludes the opt enable bit).
Whether side-set is optional for this program.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioVersion
member.summary: PIO hardware version. Determines which instructions/features are legal.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioVersion.Rp2040
member.summary: RP2040 (PIO v0).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioVersion.Rp2350
member.summary: RP2350 (PIO v1): adds extended MOV, FIFO PUTGET, GPIO base window.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest
member.summary: Destination operand. The legal subset depends on the instruction (validated at emit time).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.Pins
member.summary: The pins mapped to the instruction's pin group.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.X
member.summary: The scratch register X.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.Y
member.summary: The scratch register Y.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.Null
member.summary: Discards the data (writes nowhere).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.PinDirs
member.summary: The pin direction registers for the mapped pins.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.Pc
member.summary: The program counter (an unconditional jump).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.Status
member.summary: The status value (shares the encoding of ).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.Isr
member.summary: The input shift register (ISR).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.Osr
member.summary: The output shift register (OSR).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioDest.Exec
member.summary: Executes the value as an instruction (shares the encoding of ).

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc
member.summary: Source operand. The legal subset depends on the instruction (validated at emit time).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc.Pins
member.summary: The pins mapped to the instruction's pin group.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc.X
member.summary: The scratch register X.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc.Y
member.summary: The scratch register Y.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc.Null
member.summary: All zeroes.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc.Status
member.summary: The status value (all-ones or all-zeroes per the configured status source).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc.Isr
member.summary: The input shift register (ISR).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioSrc.Osr
member.summary: The output shift register (OSR).

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovOp
member.summary: MOV operation applied to the source before writing the destination.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovOp.None
member.summary: No operation — the source is copied unchanged.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovOp.Invert
member.summary: Bitwise NOT ("!" / "~").

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovOp.BitReverse
member.summary: Bit reverse ("::").

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition
member.summary: JMP condition (3-bit field).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition.Always
member.summary: Always jump (unconditional).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition.XZero
member.summary: !X — X is zero.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition.XPostDec
member.summary: X-- — X is non-zero prior to decrement, then decrement.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition.YZero
member.summary: !Y — Y is zero.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition.YPostDec
member.summary: Y-- — Y is non-zero prior to decrement, then decrement.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition.XNotEqualY
member.summary: X != Y.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition.Pin
member.summary: PIN — the JMP pin is high.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioCondition.OsrNotEmpty
member.summary: !OSRE — output shift register is not empty.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioWaitSource
member.summary: WAIT polarity source.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioWaitSource.Gpio
member.summary: Absolute GPIO index.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioWaitSource.Pin
member.summary: Pin relative to the state machine's IN base.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioWaitSource.Irq
member.summary: IRQ flag.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioShiftDir
member.summary: Shift direction for the ISR/OSR (and autopush/autopull defaults).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioShiftDir.Left
member.summary: Shift towards the most-significant bit (left).

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioShiftDir.Right
member.summary: Shift towards the least-significant bit (right).

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioFifoJoin
member.summary: FIFO join mode (SHIFTCTRL FJOIN). Values match the SDK's pio_fifo_join. The PUT/GET modes are RP2350 (PIO v1) only and turn the RX FIFO into a random-access register file addressed by the indexed RX-FIFO MOV instructions.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioFifoJoin.None
member.summary: Separate TX (depth 4) and RX (depth 4) FIFOs.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioFifoJoin.Tx
member.summary: TX FIFO depth 8, RX disabled.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioFifoJoin.Rx
member.summary: RX FIFO depth 8, TX disabled.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioFifoJoin.TxGet
member.summary: (v1) TX depth 4; RX storage is the processor-writable "get" register file.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioFifoJoin.TxPut
member.summary: (v1) TX depth 4; RX storage is the processor-readable "put" register file.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioFifoJoin.PutGet
member.summary: (v1) TX depth 4; RX storage is the SM-only "put"/"get" register file.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovStatusSel
member.summary: FIFO selected by the EXECCTRL status source for the mov ..., status instruction.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovStatusSel.TxLevel
member.summary: Status is all-ones when the TX FIFO level is below N.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovStatusSel.RxLevel
member.summary: Status is all-ones when the RX FIFO level is below N.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioInstructionRef
member.summary: A handle to the just-emitted instruction, used to attach a delay and/or a side-set value fluently: asm.Set(PioDest.Pins, 1).Side(1).Delay(7);. Validation of the values happens at .
member.remarks: This is a value type carrying only the owning assembler and the instruction's index — no per-instruction object is allocated. and call back into the assembler to mutate that slot.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioInstructionRef.Delay(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the post-instruction delay in cycles (range checked at Build).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioInstructionRef.Side(System.Int32)
member.summary: Asserts a side-set value alongside this instruction.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioLabel
member.summary: A jump target. Obtain one from , place it with , and reference it from JMP — forward references are resolved at time.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioLabel.Address
member.summary: Program offset where the label was marked, or -1 if not yet bound.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioLabel.IsBound
member.summary: True once the label has been placed in the instruction stream.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram
member.summary: A fully assembled PIO program: the encoded instructions plus the metadata the SDK carries in pio_program_t and applies through pio_sm_config (wrap, side-set, shift defaults, origin). Produced by .

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.Instructions
member.summary: Encoded 16-bit instruction words (length <= 32).

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.Length
member.summary: Number of instructions.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.Wrap
member.summary: PC value that wraps back to (last instruction by default).

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.WrapTarget
member.summary: PC value wrapped to (0 by default).

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.Origin
member.summary: Fixed load offset 0..31, or -1 when relocatable.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.SideSetCount
member.summary: Side-set value-bit count (excludes the optional enable bit).

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.SideSetOpt
member.summary: Whether side-set is optional (an extra enable bit is reserved).

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.SideSetPinDirs
member.summary: Whether side-set targets PINDIRS instead of PINS.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.OutShiftDir
member.summary: OUT/pull shift direction default.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.AutoPull
member.summary: Whether autopull is enabled by default.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.PullThreshold
member.summary: Autopull threshold in bits (1..32).

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.InShiftDir
member.summary: IN/push shift direction default.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.AutoPush
member.summary: Whether autopush is enabled by default.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.PushThreshold
member.summary: Autopush threshold in bits (1..32).

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.Version
member.summary: Minimum PIO version required to run this program.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram.FromEncoded(System.UInt16[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Wraps an externally produced opcode array (for example, the output of the stand-alone pioasm tool) together with its metadata, so precompiled programs and inline-assembled ones share the same load/config path.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine
member.summary: One of a PIO block's four state machines. Initialize it from a , enable it, and exchange words through the TX/RX FIFOs. Disposing releases the SM claim.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.Index
member.summary: State machine index (0..3).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.Init(System.UInt32,nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig)
member.summary: Configures and resets the state machine to start executing at (maps to pio_sm_init). The configuration is flattened to a blob and rebuilt into a pio_sm_config natively.

member.name: P:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.Enabled
member.summary: Enables or disables the state machine (maps to pio_sm_set_enabled). The getter reflects the last value set through this API.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.Put(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Pushes a word into the TX FIFO, yielding to other threads until there is room.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.Get
member.summary: Pops a word from the RX FIFO, yielding to other threads until one is available.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.IsTxFull
member.summary: True when the TX FIFO cannot accept another word.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.IsRxEmpty
member.summary: True when the RX FIFO has no words to read.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.GetTxLevel
member.summary: Reads the number of words currently queued in the TX FIFO (depth depends on FIFO join).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.GetRxLevel
member.summary: Reads the number of words currently queued in the RX FIFO (depth depends on FIFO join).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.GetProgramCounter
member.summary: Reads the state machine's current program counter (instruction-memory offset 0..31).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.TryPut(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Attempts to push a word into the TX FIFO without blocking. Returns false (and writes nothing) when the FIFO is full, so callers can poll or do other work instead of stalling the CLR thread the way does. Safe against the FIFO state changing under it: the check and the write are a single uninterrupted managed step on the cooperative CLR.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.TryGet(System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Attempts to pop a word from the RX FIFO without blocking. Returns false (and sets to 0) when the FIFO is empty, instead of blocking like .

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.ClearFifos
member.summary: Clears this state machine's TX and RX FIFOs (maps to pio_sm_clear_fifos).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.DrainTxFifo
member.summary: Drains any words left in the TX FIFO (maps to pio_sm_drain_tx_fifo): useful before reconfiguring or restarting so a stale half-streamed frame is not emitted.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.Restart
member.summary: Restarts the state machine's internal state — ISR/OSR, shift counters, delay/clock phase (maps to pio_sm_restart). Does not touch the FIFOs or the program counter.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.ClockDivRestart
member.summary: Restarts this state machine's clock divider so its phase realigns with other SMs started at the same time (maps to pio_sm_clkdiv_restart).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.SetClockDivisor(System.Single)
member.summary: Changes the clock divider (1.0 .. 65536.0) live and restarts the divider phase.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.Exec(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Immediately executes a single instruction on the state machine, out of band, without advancing the program counter (maps to pio_sm_exec). Encode the 16-bit instruction with (or take a word from an assembled ).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.SetConsecutivePinDirs(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the direction (output/input) of consecutive pins starting at for this state machine (maps to pio_sm_set_consecutive_pindirs). Pins an SM drives with OUT/SET/side-set must be set as outputs; combine with , which routes them to the block.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachine.Finalize
member.summary: Releases the SM claim if the instance is collected without an explicit Dispose.

member.name: T:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig
member.summary: Fluent configuration for a PIO state machine. Seed it from an assembled program with so wrap, side-set and shift defaults are applied automatically, then set the pin mappings and clock divider.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.BlobLength
member.summary: Number of entries in the flattened configuration blob.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxOutBase
member.summary: Blob index of the OUT pin base.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxOutCount
member.summary: Blob index of the OUT pin count.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxSetBase
member.summary: Blob index of the SET pin base.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxSetCount
member.summary: Blob index of the SET pin count.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxSideSetBase
member.summary: Blob index of the side-set pin base.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxSideSetCount
member.summary: Blob index of the side-set value-bit count.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxSideSetOpt
member.summary: Blob index of the side-set optional flag.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxSideSetPinDirs
member.summary: Blob index of the side-set PINDIRS flag.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxInBase
member.summary: Blob index of the IN pin base.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxJmpPin
member.summary: Blob index of the JMP PIN GPIO.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxOutShiftRight
member.summary: Blob index of the OUT/pull shift-right flag.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxAutoPull
member.summary: Blob index of the autopull flag.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxPullThreshold
member.summary: Blob index of the autopull threshold.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxInShiftRight
member.summary: Blob index of the IN/push shift-right flag.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxAutoPush
member.summary: Blob index of the autopush flag.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxPushThreshold
member.summary: Blob index of the autopush threshold.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxWrapTarget
member.summary: Blob index of the wrap-target offset.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxWrap
member.summary: Blob index of the wrap offset.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxClkDivInt
member.summary: Blob index of the clock-divider integer part.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxClkDivFrac
member.summary: Blob index of the clock-divider fractional part.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxFifoJoin
member.summary: Blob index of the FIFO join mode.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxGpioBase
member.summary: Blob index of the GPIO base.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxMovStatusSel
member.summary: Blob index of the MOV status source selector.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxMovStatusN
member.summary: Blob index of the MOV status N threshold.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxOutSticky
member.summary: Blob index of the OUT sticky flag.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxInlineOutEn
member.summary: Blob index of the inline-OUT-enable flag.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.IdxOutEnSel
member.summary: Blob index of the inline OUT enable bit selector.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty configuration (clkdiv = 1.0, no pins mapped).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.FromProgram(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioProgram,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a configuration pre-populated from an assembled program loaded at : wrap/side-set/shift defaults are taken from the program (matching the SDK's *_program_get_default_config).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.OutPins(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Maps the OUT pin group (base GPIO and consecutive pin count).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.SetPins(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Maps the SET pin group (base GPIO and consecutive pin count, 0..5).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.SideSetPins(System.Int32)
member.summary: Maps the side-set pin base. The count comes from the program/assembler.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.InPins(System.Int32)
member.summary: Maps the IN pin base.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.JmpPin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Selects the GPIO used by the JMP PIN condition.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.ClockDivisor(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the clock divider (1.0 .. 65536.0). The SM advances at sysclk/div. Stored as the integer and 1/256 fractional parts of the CLKDIV register.

member.name: F:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.DefaultSystemClockHz
member.summary: Default system clock used by — the RP2040 power-on default (125 MHz). Pass the real sysclk to that method if you changed it or run on RP2350.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.ClockFromFrequency(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the clock divider from a target state-machine execution frequency rather than a raw divisor: div = sysClockHz / frequencyHz (mirrors the SDK pattern around clock_get_hz(clk_sys)). The divisor is clamped to the legal 1.0..65536.0 range, so frequencies above sysclk peg at div 1.0 and very low ones at div 65536.0.
member.param: Desired SM tick frequency in Hz (must be positive).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.FifoJoin(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioFifoJoin)
member.summary: Sets the FIFO join mode. The PUT/GET modes (RP2350/PIO v1) make the RX FIFO a random-access register file for the indexed RX-FIFO MOV instructions.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.GpioBase(System.Int32)
member.summary: (RP2350) Selects the block's GPIO base — 0 (pins 0..31) or 16 (pins 16..47) — so a state machine can reach the upper GPIOs on 48-pin packages (RP2350B). Pin mappings stay absolute GPIO numbers; the base is subtracted to form the 5-bit pin fields.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.Wrap(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Overrides the wrap region (absolute program offsets). Normally seeded by FromProgram.

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.MovStatus(nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioMovStatusSel,System.Int32)
member.summary: Source for the mov ..., status instruction: all-ones when the selected FIFO's level is less than , else all-zeroes (EXECCTRL STATUS_SEL/STATUS_N).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.OutSpecial(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: OUT special behaviour: keeps the last OUT/SET value driven each cycle; uses OUT bit as a per-cycle output enable (EXECCTRL OUT_STICKY / INLINE_OUT_EN / OUT_EN_SEL).

member.name: M:nanoFramework.Hardware.Pico.Pio.PioStateMachineConfig.ToBlob
member.summary: Flattens the configuration into the fixed-layout blob handed to native interop.
